jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - NAREDCO - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
NAREDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NAREDCO:
NAREDCO is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NAREDCO!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
